title: Dental Nurse/Assistant Wanted (No nights, 5.5 Days, Centrally Located)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

At Dental Designs Clinic, we are a leading dental practice with multiple modern clinics located conveniently in Singapore's Central Business District. We are dedicated to redefining dentistry by combining compassionate, patient-centric care with cutting-edge dental technology and innovative techniques. Our mission is to provide exceptional dental experiences, ensuring precision, comfort, and outstanding results for every patient.

We offer a comprehensive range of dental services, from routine check-ups and cleanings to advanced treatments like dental implants, Invisalign, root canal therapy, and cosmetic dentistry. With our in-house lab, we ensure efficient and high-quality bespoke solutions. We pride ourselves on a team of highly skilled and experienced dental professionals who are committed to continuous learning and staying at the forefront of dental advancements.

We are seeking passionate and dedicated individuals to join our vibrant team. If you are looking for an environment where your skills are valued, professional growth is encouraged, and you can contribute to making a genuine difference in patients' lives, Dental Designs Clinic is the place for you. Join us in our commitment to dental excellence and building long-lasting relationships with our patients.

Job Summary

We are an established dental clinic located at the heart of the CBD area and Orchard Area. We consist of a vibrant team of individuals who aim to provide quality and ethical dental care. We take pride in giving the best for our patients and building long lasting relationships.

Responsibilities

  • Assist dentists during dental procedures to ensure smooth and efficient treatment delivery
  • Sterilise dental tools and equipment to maintain a safe and hygienic clinical environment
  • Communicate treatment plans and care instructions clearly to patients to support their understanding and comfort
  • Participate actively in orientation and training sessions to continuously improve dental nursing skills and knowledge

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience in dental assisting to support clinical operations effectively
  • Willingness to work in the Central Business District (CBD) area to meet clinic location requirements
  • Previous work experience in a dental or healthcare setting is preferred

Other Information

  • Fixed working hours with 5.5 working days per week and no night shifts
  • Full-time positions available
  • Some staff have been with the clinic for 9 years and counting, reflecting a supportive work environment
